# Pole

- **Type**: G|XPHB
- **Cost**: 0.05 gp
- **Weight**: 7 lb.

A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away. If you must make a Strength ([[athletics]]) check as part of a High or [[long_jump Jump]], you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself [[advantage]] on the check.
